name: cognitive-modes
description: Sixteen type-keyed cognitive operating modes for Claude Code. Each plugin maps an MBTI type to behavioral heuristics derived from its Jungian function stack — the type is an index, the payload is a concrete operating protocol. Behavioral scaffolds for inducing distinct operating styles, not a claim that the types are validated cognitive science.

plugins.name: entp-mode
plugins.description: Divergent generation (Ne/Ti): idea generation, concept expansion, frame-breaking, and inversion. Two skills — ideation and inversion.

plugins.name: intp-mode
plugins.description: System building (Ti/Ne): first-principles architecture, defining primitives and invariants, modeling a whole structure for internal coherence.

plugins.name: intj-mode
plugins.description: Theory testing (Ni/Te): forming hypotheses, deriving falsifiable predictions, designing the test most likely to break a claim.

plugins.name: entj-mode
plugins.description: Execution planning (Te/Ni): Turn a goal or vision into a structured, sequenced, metric-driven execution plan.

plugins.name: infj-mode
plugins.description: Assessment (Ni/Fe): synthesizing scattered signals into a coherent read of a text, argument, system, or dynamic, then weighing human impact. Scoped to artifacts, not diagnosing people.

plugins.name: infp-mode
plugins.description: Values alignment (Fi/Ne): Check whether a piece of work, decision, or message aligns with core values, and find the authentic angle.

plugins.name: enfj-mode
plugins.description: Facilitation (Fe/Ni): Craft communication and process that brings people into alignment — messages, meeting designs, difficult conversations, stakeholder buy-in.

plugins.name: enfp-mode
plugins.description: Possibility & momentum (Ne/Fi): Generate possibilities that connect to what energizes and matters to someone — brainstorming with a motivational and personal thread, opening options when someone feels stuck or flat.

plugins.name: istj-mode
plugins.description: Procedure & compliance (Si/Te): Apply standards, precedent, and established procedure rigorously — verify work against a spec, build checklists, ensure compliance, catch deviations from what's proven.

plugins.name: isfj-mode
plugins.description: Stewardship & documentation (Si/Fe): Preserve and document what works, and attend carefully to concrete needs — thorough documentation, onboarding material, capturing institutional knowledge, supporting people with practical detail.

plugins.name: estj-mode
plugins.description: Operations & delivery (Te/Si): Organize execution and drive work to completion against a standard — logistics, process, coordinating moving parts, enforcing that things actually get done on time and to spec.

plugins.name: esfj-mode
plugins.description: Coordination & consensus (Fe/Si): Coordinate people and logistics toward smooth delivery and consensus — organizing group efforts, aligning schedules and roles, keeping everyone informed and on board.

plugins.name: istp-mode
plugins.description: Troubleshooting & debugging (Ti/Se): Diagnose a malfunction at the mechanism level and find the pragmatic fix — debugging, root-causing a failure, figuring out why something concrete isn't working.

plugins.name: isfp-mode
plugins.description: Aesthetic & craft (Fi/Se): Make aesthetic and craft judgments grounded in concrete sensory detail and genuine personal taste — visual and tactile design feedback, refining the feel of a thing, choosing what looks and feels right.

plugins.name: estp-mode
plugins.description: Rapid response (Se/Ti): Solve a problem in real time under pressure — fast tactical decisions, incident response, thinking on your feet when there's no time for a full plan.

plugins.name: esfp-mode
plugins.description: Engagement & experience (Se/Fi): Design for present-moment experience and audience connection — making something engaging, lively, and emotionally resonant in the moment: presentations, events, demos, content that needs to land with real people.
